title: No Tax Breaks for Radical Corporate Activism Act
short_title: No Tax Breaks for Radical Corporate Activism Act
plain_summary: This bill changes tax rules for companies. Companies will not be able to get tax breaks if they pay for employees to travel for abortions. Companies also cannot get tax breaks if they pay for medical treatments that help children under 18 change their gender. The bill explains exactly what kinds of medical treatments count as gender transition procedures.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the No Tax Breaks for Radical Corporate Activism Act.

sections.title: Section 2 Denial of Deduction
sections.text: This section changes the tax code to stop companies from getting tax breaks for certain employee benefits. Companies cannot deduct money they spend to pay back employees for travel costs to get an abortion. Companies also cannot deduct money they spend to pay back employees for medical procedures that help change the gender of the employee's child who is under eighteen years old. Gender transition procedure means any medical or surgery service that tries to change body parts that are typical for someone's biological sex or create body parts that look like the opposite sex. This includes doctor visits, hospital stays, gender transition surgery, and prescription drugs like puberty blocking drugs or cross sex hormones. However, this does not include treatment for real medical disorders where someone is born with unclear biological sex characteristics or treatment for injuries or diseases caused by gender transition procedures. Gender means the mental, behavioral, social, and cultural parts of being male or female. Gender transition means when someone goes from living as their biological sex to living as a different gender and may involve social, legal, or physical changes. Gender transition surgery means any surgery done to help someone transition genders but does not include surgery needed to save someone's life or prevent major harm to their body. Genital surgery includes procedures that change sexual organs. Non genital surgery includes procedures like liposuction, voice surgery, breast changes, and facial changes. Puberty blocking drugs are synthetic drugs that stop hormones that cause puberty in children when used to help with gender transition. Cross sex hormones are testosterone given to biological females or estrogen given to biological males in much larger amounts than their bodies would naturally make. Minor child means someone under eighteen years old. These changes apply to tax years that begin after this law is passed.
